name: Great Bend Recreation Commission
description: Great Bend Recreation Commission is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Great Bend, KS. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Shannon Schartz Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Shannon Schartz Courts in Great Bend, KS! There are 4 outdoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
